## Summary

I design, engineer, and ship AI products. I work across the full stack, from product design and design systems to data science, ML pipelines, and agentic architecture. I build AI into products and use AI to build. My range spans sole founder to embedded partner with engineering teams of eleven.

I started in design and moved deeper into engineering because the most interesting problems live at the intersection. I've built synthetic forecasting prediction engines, functional medicine AI agents, browser-based SQL IDEs, and logistics auditing platforms. Every project taught me something about what happens when you hold design and engineering in the same head: the interfaces get better, the architecture gets cleaner, and the products ship faster.

I think in systems. The best products come from someone who understands the user's experience and the technical architecture simultaneously. I don't hand off designs to engineers or specs to designers. I hold both, and that compression removes an entire class of translation errors. I also believe AI-assisted development is a genuine force multiplier. I've trained teams to sustain 6x velocity increases and built products where the AI is the product.

## Career History

### Example Forecast Lab — Design Engineer / Sole Technical Founder (2025–present)

An 11-service AI platform for synthetic forecasting, built from zero. Every layer, every service, every pixel.

- **Web:** Next.js 15, React 19, Apollo GraphQL, Tailwind, Clerk auth
- **Native mobile:** SwiftUI (iOS), Kotlin/Jetpack Compose (Android), RevenueCat payments
- **Conversational AI:** LangGraph agent orchestration, multi-model routing (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq), SSE streaming, tool calling for live synthetic scenarios
- **Prediction engine:** Proprietary factor discovery system (XGBoost, LightGBM), three-window temporal validation with frozen boundaries, market-aware evaluation after the ~4.5% vig
- **Decision automation:** NautilusTrader + Kalshi execution, Redis-backed control state, circuit breakers, daily P&L monitoring
- **Data pipeline:** Real-time ingestion from ESPN, SportsGameOdds, BallDontLie; dbt analytics layer with Dagster orchestration
- **Research tools:** Example Research Shell (terminal-based research agent on Bun with WhatsApp gateway)

Results: positive ROI across every synthetic forecast type (improved calibration across all synthetic forecast categories), validated across 1,000+ synthetic evaluations. 50 pilot users, weekly active cohort, no paid acquisition. Funded on product quality and methodology.

### Example Studio — Design Engineer & Product Consultant (2021–present)

Creative technology studio. One senior builder, augmented by AI, embedded with client teams. many products shipped, many launch impressions.

Selected engagements:

**Example Data Studio (2025)** — AI Transformation & Frontend Architecture. Embedded with 11-person engineering team. Designed complete UI/UX for browser-based SQL IDE. Built 66-component design system on Radix/shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS 4. Monaco Editor integration with multi-dialect SQL tokenizers. Coached team from 50 commits/week to 300+ sustained (5-7x velocity).

**Example Care Journal (2025)** — Conversational Health AI. Sole designer-engineer. Designed 7-phase clinical conversation arc (Mirror, System Explanation, Reframe, Keystone Action, What NOT to Do, Tracking Prompt, Anchoring Truth). Built 5-category persistent memory system. Multi-store RAG across four vector stores. Three persona modes (Guide, Deep Dive, Practitioner). early waitlist. Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, Python/FastAPI, OpenAI Agent Kit, Mem0, Redis, PostgreSQL.

**Example Market (2024, Co-founder)** — HR Consultant Marketplace. CRM + marketplace for independent HR consultants. Led product strategy from 80 user interviews through launch. Designed client workspaces, cross-client dashboard, marketplace, invoicing. Built brand identity and investor materials. Raised small pre-seed round.

**Example Wellness (2025)** — Luxury wellness brand. Brand identity, web experience (Framer), physical space integration. Dark-and-gold palette, infinity moonmark logomark. Zero patients to six weeks fully booked.

**Example Logistics (2024)** — Logistics Compliance SaaS. Rebuilt design system with engineering-grade structure (semantic tokens, 1:1 Figma-to-code mapping). Co-designed rules engine taxonomy for ML-powered invoice auditing. Redesigned onboarding from 2-month human process to 2-week software pipeline. Clients: True Classic, Magic Spoon, Seed Health, Nood.

**Example Golf (2024)** — Sports & Commerce Platform. Three product surfaces: consumer mobile (GPS, shot tracking, 8+ game modes), on-course ordering with cart GPS delivery, web admin with POS integration. Designed for direct sunlight readability and one-handed use. SXSW recognition, Alberta Innovates grant.

### Example HR — Director, Product Design (2017–2024)

Joined as employee #2 when Example HR was 5 people with seed funding. Grew over 6 years from first design hire to Director of Product Design, reporting to CEO.

- Built the entire customer-facing product from scratch: onboarding, compliance management, employee records, HR policy library, communication hub, termination compliance workflow
- Designed the internal HR manager platform for 200+ HR managers: unified client timeline, customer context system, guided compliance workflows
- Designed the conversion funnel (primary revenue engine), adaptive onboarding flows, and 5-tier pricing system
- Built "Example Design System" design system
- Produced investor pitch decks and interactive Figma prototypes supporting staged capital in fundraising across multiple rounds
- Managed team of 3 designers

Company metrics: $0 to growth-stage revenue, growth-stage valuation, staged capital raised (seed through Series C), 5 to 200 employees, 0 to many customers served.

Career break for health and well-being (Oct 2021 – Jul 2022).

### Example Care — Co-Founder / Designer + Engineer (2014–2016)

Designed and engineered the first veterinary telehealth platform. Category creation before the category existed.

- Native iOS (Objective-C) and Android (Java) apps
- Provider web portal (Rails)
- Real-time video consultation infrastructure (TokBox/OpenTok) with reconnection handling for unreliable 3G/4G networks
- Patient record system
- 20,000+ users, press in Forbes and Yahoo Finance
- Mapped the VCPR regulatory boundary that shaped how every pet telehealth platform after was built

### Example Arts Festival — Head of Design (2012–2013)

Won a competitive brand pitch against 5 agencies at age 24. Created the iconic paint-splattered heart logo. Designed 10,000+ pieces of environmental signage across 18 city blocks of downtown Las Vegas. Built custom CMS and API layer syncing website, mobile app, and artist management. Designed stage graphics, merchandise, maps, wristbands. large attendance on opening day. The festival still runs a decade later.

### Earlier Work

- **Example Events (2013)** — Platform for the electronic music community to promote and discover events and festivals
- **Example Audio** — Creator discovery platform (co-founder). Strategy, branding, UI, UX, code
- **Example Fitness** — Home fitness/AI platform. Led Data team. Example Data + Braze customer engagement
- **Example Labs** — Environmental testing dashboards. Complex data visualization with IE9 constraints

**Strategy:** Zero-to-One Product, Team Velocity Coaching, AI Transformation, Technical Architecture

## Studio Philosophy (Example Studio)

We think about software the way architects think about light. Where it enters, how it moves, what it reveals. The interface is a consequence of that thinking, not the starting point.

Example Studio exists in the overlap between design, engineering, and intelligence. We build products, but what we actually do is hold the full shape of a problem in our heads long enough for something coherent to come out. The brand, the system architecture, the way a screen feels at the end of a long day. Those aren't separate disciplines. They're one discipline that most teams have fractured across departments.

We are a small studio by conviction. One senior builder, augmented by AI, embedded with your team. The model only works because the person doing the work holds design, engineering, and product in the same thought.

Every engagement starts from the belief that good software is a design problem, an engineering problem, and a business problem at the same time, and that the best outcomes come from treating them as one.
